allow: Bash(wsl -e bash -c "uname -a && which gcc readelf gdb cmake")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm -v "$\(pwd -W\):/work" -w /work gcc:13 bash -c "echo 'int main\(\){return 0;}' > /tmp/t.c && gcc -c /tmp/t.c -o /tmp/t.o && readelf -h /tmp/t.o | head -12 && which gdb cmake && gdb --version | head -1 && cmake --version | head -1")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm gcc:13 bash -c "which gdb cmake make g++ 2>&1; apt list --installed 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'gdb|cmake'")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker build -t elf-linker-dev:1 -f tests/Dockerfile.dev tests/)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm elf-linker-dev:1 bash -c "gcc --version | head -1; cmake --version | head -1; gdb --version | head -1; readelf --version | head -1")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm -v "$\(pwd -W\):/work" -w /work elf-linker-dev:1 bash -c "cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug 2>&1 | tail -10 && cmake --build build -j 2>&1 | tail -40")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm -v "$\(pwd -W\):/work" -w /work elf-linker-dev:1 bash tests/run_tests.sh 1)
